name: TEST - Service Period Start After PO End (Line Items) (CIB)
trigger_condition:
(
  not is_empty(field.sp_item_start_date_export)
  and not is_empty(field.item_po_line_sp_end_date_normalized)
  and field.sp_item_start_date_export > field.item_po_line_sp_end_date_normalized
)

payload.content: The start date on the document is greater than the end date on the item. Please double-check.
The start date on the document is greater than the end date on the item. Please double-check.
